vocab.meaning: thư giãn sau một ngày làm việc mệt mỏi/áp lực
vocab.example: Engaging in pottery allows me to unwind after a taxing day at the office.

vocab.meaning: một kênh/phương thức giải tỏa hữu ích
vocab.example: Woodworking serves as a productive outlet for my energy, resulting in handmade furniture for my home.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào cái gì đó
vocab.example: I love to immerse myself in historical non-fiction during my spare time to broaden my perspective.

vocab.meaning: một sở thích nhất thời/ngắn ngủi
vocab.example: Unlike many people who have a fleeting interest in trends, I have been dedicated to philately for over a decade.
Solving complex crosswords is my favorite way to stave off boredom during long commutes.

vocab.meaning: tìm hiểu sâu về cái gì đó
vocab.example: In my free time, I often delve into the intricacies of molecular gastronomy to elevate my cooking skills.

vocab.meaning: một nghề tay trái hái ra tiền (từ sở thích)
vocab.example: What started as a simple hobby in graphic design has eventually morphed into a lucrative side hustle.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng hiểu biết về văn hóa
vocab.example: Learning the sitar is not just a musical hobby; it’s a way for me to broaden my cultural horizons.
Being an avid collector of vintage vinyl, I spend my weekends scouring flea markets for rare finds.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui từ việc gì
vocab.example: I derive immense pleasure from the simple act of nurturing my indoor plants and watching them thrive.
